segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Are you going to the outdoor concert this Saturday? Is it still happening with all the rain in the forecast? They said it's on rain or shine, plus we might get a dry window in the evening. I'll think about it. I have a lot of studying to do for my law school exam, but I'd love to see the performance of the headline band, the Rumbling Waves. I grew up in the same neighborhood as their lead singer and even played basketball with him a few times.
